title: What Is This Strange Line of Planets?
description:
These are all the planets outside our solar system we’ve ever found! But what is this big line of planets?

Back in 2009, most of the very few “exoplanets” we’d found were big gassy ones like Jupiter. But were there more like Earth? NASA launched a telescope to find out…

For optimistic science and tech stories, subscribe!

#space #science #NASA #planets #telescope #aliens
